instruction: Make source omissions visible and make manual review measurable. Add heartbeat tracking, golden fixtures and CI checks without introducing paid services.
requirements: Track each source's last nonzero result in DynamoDB
Flag a source after its configured number of consecutive zero-item runs
Include heartbeat warnings in operator draft review output
Create 20 to 30 hand-labeled records per new source
Test matcher and classifier behavior offline without live network calls
Capture operator KEEP and CUT decisions as evaluation labels
Fail CI when precision drops below the established baseline
stop_after: Return evaluation results, baseline comparison and remaining false-positive risks, then stop.
